target.title: fix(server): send one response.create after all multi-tool outputs
target.body:
## Summary

- When `response.done` contains multiple `function_call` items (e.g. `query_agent` + `save_call_report`), the previous loop sent one `response.create` per tool. The second call fails with "already has an active response", silencing the model's follow-up turn.
- Fix: collect all `function_call_output` items inside the loop, then send a single `response.create` once all outputs are queued.
- A `hasOutput` flag gates the final send so cancelled responses (caught earlier) do not trigger an unnecessary `response.create`.

## Real behavior proof

Ran the actual `vox serve` process with `OPENAI_REALTIME_URL` pointing at a local fake Realtime stand-in and a Twilio-protocol WebSocket caller. The fake provider emitted one `response.done` with **two** `save_call_report` function_call items, then verified what came back.

Provider log (redacted paths):
```
2026-06-19T17:58:38.469Z provider: -> response.done with 2 save_call_report function_calls
2026-06-19T17:58:38.471Z provider: <- conversation.item.create {type:conversation.item.create, call_id:call_multi_1, output:{ok:true}}
2026-06-19T17:58:38.472Z provider: <- conversation.item.create {type:conversation.item.create, call_id:call_multi_2, output:{ok:true}}
2026-06-19T17:58:38.472Z provider: <- response.create {type:response.create}

=== PROOF SUMMARY ===
  conversation.item.create events: 2 (expected 2)
  response.create events:          1 (expected 1)
  item[0] call_id=call_multi_1 ok=true
  item[1] call_id=call_multi_2 ok=true
  RESULT: PASS — exactly 1 response.create after 2 tool outputs
```

Two `conversation.item.create` events arrive (one per tool), followed by exactly **one** `response.create`. On the old code a second `response.create` would fire immediately after the first tool output, before the second output was queued.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm run lint`
- [x] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [x] `pnpm test` — 58/58 passing, including:
  - `test/server-multi-tool.test.ts` — multi-tool response emits exactly one `response.create`; single-tool response still emits one
- [x] `pnpm run build`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: joevenner
